---
Source: https://www.windowfilmphiladelphia.net
Last updated: 2026-05-27
Owner: Window Film Philadelphia
Contact: contact@windowfilmphiladelphia.net | (267) 394-7980
Location: Philadelphia, PA — serving the Philadelphia metro area, Camden NJ, Reading PA, and Upper Darby Township PA
Service area: Philadelphia, Camden, Reading, Upper Darby Township (and surrounding counties in PA and NJ)
---

## Site Overview

Window Film Philadelphia is a commercial and residential window film contractor based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. The company has served the Philadelphia metro area since 2008, offering professional installation of window film for energy savings, security, privacy, UV protection, glare reduction, anti-graffiti, and decorative applications. All installations carry a lifetime manufacturer warranty. The company works with film brands including 3M, LLumar, Vista, Solar Gard, Madico, Huper Optik, Hanita Coatings, C-Bond, and others.

Service categories:
- Energy savings and solar control
- Safety and security (ballistic-resistant, blast-mitigation, anti-graffiti)
- Privacy and decorative film
- UV blocking
- Glare reduction
- Exterior building wraps and window film alternatives

Property types served:
- Residential homes (single-family, multi-family, rowhomes)
- Commercial offices and retail
- Hotels and hospitality
- Schools and universities
- Government buildings
- Healthcare facilities
- Museums and libraries
- Churches
- Secured buildings and data centers

## Pages

### Top-Level Pages
- / — Homepage
- /benefits/ — Window film benefits overview (energy, security, privacy, UV, glare, anti-graffiti, decorative, exterior, ballistic, blast mitigation, bird strike prevention, school security, elevator refinishing, mirror refinishing, updating surfaces)
- /applications/ — Application areas (office, retail, hotels, restaurants, schools, arenas/stadiums, secured buildings, museums, churches, mass transit)
- /products/ — Film brands (3M, LLumar, Vista, Madico, NanoTint, C-Bond, HDClear, Hanita Coatings, Solyx, Solar Gard, Huper Optik, Bird Divert)
- /resources/ — Guides, pricing, warranty, maintenance, architects/builders specs, commercial FAQ, fact sheets
- /cities/ — Service area overview
- /process/ — Installation process (consultation → preparation → installation)
- /contact/ — Contact page (email: contact@windowfilmphiladelphia.net, phone: (267) 394-7980)
- /blog/ — Blog

### Key Benefit Pages
- /benefits/energy-savings/ — Energy savings and solar control film
- /benefits/safety-and-security/ — Safety and security window film (ballistic-resistant, blast-mitigation, anti-graffiti)
- /benefits/privacy-window-film-philadelphia/ — Privacy and decorative film
- /benefits/uv-blocking-window-film-philadelphia/ — UV blocking film (up to 99.9% UV rejection)
- /benefits/glare-reduction/ — Glare reduction film
- /benefits/anti-graffiti/ — Anti-graffiti protective film
- /benefits/ballistic-resistance/ — Ballistic-resistant window film for schools, banks, government
- /benefits/blast-mitigation/ — Bomb blast protection film
- /benefits/school-security-window-film/ — School security window film
- /benefits/bird-strike-prevention/ — Bird strike prevention film (fritted patterns)
- /benefits/exterior-building-wraps/ — Exterior building wraps and graphics
- /benefits/exterior-window-film/ — Exterior window film for refinishing
- /benefits/mirror-refinishing/ — Mirror refinishing film

- /benefits/updating-surfaces/ — Surface updating film (elevators, lobbies)
- /benefits/elevator-refinishing/ — Elevator refinishing film

## Business Information

Name: Window Film Philadelphia
Phone: (267) 394-7980
Email: contact@windowfilmphiladelphia.net
Address: Philadelphia, PA (local, no street address listed)
Service region: Philadelphia metro area, Camden NJ, Reading PA, Upper Darby Township PA
Years in business: Since 2008 (17+ years)
Warranty: Lifetime manufacturer warranty on all residential and commercial installations
Certifications: Factory-certified installers for 3M, LLumar, Vista, Solar Gard, and other major brands
Insurance: Licensed and insured in PA and NJ

## Structured Data

This site uses Schema.org structured data:
- LocalBusiness schema on all pages (name, address, telephone, email, areaServed, openingHours, priceRange)
- FAQPage schema on: /cities/camden/, /cities/philadelphia/, /benefits/, /benefits/safety-and-security/, /benefits/energy-savings/, /applications/
- Service schema on: all 16 benefit pages and all 10 application sub-pages

## Content Format

- Process page describes the 3-step installation process (consultation, preparation, installation)
- FAQ pages contain 6 question-answer pairs per page
- Benefits and application pages describe specific film types with pricing ranges and use cases
- City pages include local-specific information (e.g., Camden crime statistics, NJ law compliance)
- Stats on homepage: 15+ years experience, 5,000+ projects completed, 50+ cities served
